item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer brakes the requested N+1 local reminder immediately, frames the prior time/attachment/format fixes as repeated downstream information overlays, and moves upstream to a unified pre-submission compliance gate covering time, attachments, format, and citations.
